subject: ISOM
course_description: This course provides a comprehensive introduction to the methodology and practice of modern data science and AI, equipping students with the conceptual understanding and coding skills needed to leverage data and AI as strategic assets in business decision-making. The course covers both foundational and contemporary approaches, including regression, classification, nonlinearity, and regularization, as well as emerging AI techniques such as text analysis, and generative AI. Emphasis is placed on understanding when and how to apply these tools, their limitations, and their implications for real-world business contexts. Through hands-on coding and applied projects, students will learn to build, evaluate, and deploy data-driven and AI-powered solutions to complex business problems. By the end of the course, students will be well-prepared to critically assess and effectively use AI and machine learning to drive informed decisions and sustainable competitive advantage.
